accomplishments: Implemented two-phase commit for melt (lockProofsAsPending/burnPendingProofs/releasePendingProofs) — fixes irrecoverable proof loss on Lightning payment failure
Implemented LND gRPC backend: createInvoice, subscribeInvoices, decodePayReq, sendPayment (4/5 methods fully wired; estimateFee calls EstimateRouteFee RPC with 1%+1sat fallback)
Added startInvoiceSubscriptionLoop in server.ts with 5s backoff auto-restart — replaces FakeWallet polling hack
Added feeReserve field to PendingQuote schema, persisted on melt quote creation
Implemented NUT-07 PENDING proof state — getProofStatesByY() queries both SpentProof and PendingProof tables
Added melt quote expiry check mirroring getMintQuote behavior
Added CORS support via @fastify/cors (origin: true, GET/POST/OPTIONS, Content-Type/Authorization)
Hardened hex/point validation at edge with hexPoint Zod validator (02/03 + 64 hex chars)
Added cashu-ts integration tests: getInfo, getKeys, full mint flow, swap, NUT-07 UNSPENT/SPENT
Implemented keyset rotation: rotateKeyset(), multi-keyset init() loading, deactivateKeyset(), derivationIndex tracking
Fixed estimateFee void-reject bug + removed dead destBytes/paymentHash void-suppress patterns
Fixed getActiveKeyset() plain Error => typed KeysetNotFoundError
Fixed non-null assertion in signOutputs() => explicit null check + typed error
Removed dead getProofStates() export (superseded by getProofStatesByY())
Simplified redundant witness ternary patterns in mint-service.ts
Implemented EstimateRouteFee RPC call in lnd.ts estimateFee

Feature coverage at 59% — SWITCH_PROJECT gate requires 90%

P2: Remove dead @fastify/swagger and @fastify/websocket dependencies or wire them up

key_decisions: Two-phase commit for melt uses PENDING proof state with SERIALIZABLE isolation — proofs locked before payment, burned on success, released on failure
LND estimateFee calls EstimateRouteFee RPC but falls back to 1%+1sat if RPC fails — safe for production but imprecise
repository.ts witness patterns (null ?? undefined) retained — Prisma NullableJsonNull guard prevents type error
cashu-ts integration tests use describe.skipIf(!DATABASE_URL) for conditional DB gating

incomplete_features: LND sendPayment fee:0 hardcode (production gap — lnd.ts:188)
NUT-08 not advertised in SUPPORTED_NUTS (partial implementation undisclosed)
Keyset rotation trigger (rotateKeyset() exists but no endpoint/config to invoke it)
LND subscribeInvoices reconnect resilience (untested against real LND)
DLEQ proofs (NUT-12) — Phase 2, acceptable to defer
